shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch the HackProduct mascot standing in front of a play button with a subtle dollar sign on cream background.
assets.caption: Hatch the HackProduct mascot standing in front of a play button with a subtle dollar sign on cream background.
assets.prompt: YouTube's Pivot to Creators | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing in front of an oversized play button on a cream background, cap slightly tilted, arms relaxed. The play button has a subtle dollar sign embedded in the triangle. No text in scene. HackProduct wordmark watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.
